introSection: Zillerator is a travelling steel roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer D.P.V. Rides currently owned by US carnival operator Butler Amusements.

sections.title: Design

fullText:
Zillerator is a travelling steel roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer D.P.V. Rides currently owned by US carnival operator Butler Amusements.

Originally painted blue with cyan supports, the track is now painted yellow.




 * Photographs of this roller coaster in 2000
